Collision Controller Module¶

Collision system module.

Provides logic for validating movement and detecting collisions between entities, map boundaries, and world objects.

class controller.collision_controller.CollisionController(game_controller)[source]¶

Handle collision detection for the game world.

Responsibilities:

  • Prevent movement outside map boundaries

  • Detect collisions with static map objects

  • Resolve entity-to-entity interactions

__check_entity_collision(new_x: int, new_y: int, call_entity) → bool¶

Resolve collisions between moving entities.

Handles interactions such as:

  • Player - NPC combat

  • NPC - NPC blocking

  • Weapon hits on NPCs

Parameters:

  • new_x (int) – Target X coordinate.

  • new_y (int) – Target Y coordinate.

  • call_entity (Entity) – Entity attempting movement.

Returns:

True if movement is allowed, False if blocked.

Return type:

bool

check_collision(new_x: int, new_y: int, call_entity) → bool[source]¶

Validate whether a movement to the given position is allowed.

This method checks:

  • Map boundaries

  • Static tile collisions (walls, goals)

  • Dynamic entity collisions

Parameters:

  • new_x (int) – Target X coordinate.

  • new_y (int) – Target Y coordinate.

  • call_entity (Entity) – Entity requesting movement.

Returns:

True if movement is allowed, False otherwise.

Return type:

bool

RPG Game
